title: Checkout Management
subtitle: Manage checkout requests, approvals, and returns
description: Manage equipment checkout requests and status.

onboarding.title: Get started with checkout management
onboarding.description: Submit checkout requests for calibration, repair, or rental, and manage approvals and returns.

metadata.returnDescription: Process return of equipment checked out for {purpose} from {destination}

noData.title: No checkout records
noData.description: Submit a checkout request to manage calibration, repair, or rental outbound.

filtered.title: No results match your filters
filtered.description: Try changing your filters or resetting them to see all records.

celebration.title: No overdue checkouts
celebration.description: All checkouts have been returned within their due dates.

toasts.borrowerApproveSuccess: 1st approval completed. Awaiting lender team approval.
toasts.exportFormError: Failed to export checkout in/out confirmation form.
toasts.versionConflictDesc: Data has been updated. Please check the latest status.
toasts.returnError: An error occurred during return processing.
toasts.returnApproveError: An error occurred during return approval.
toasts.returnRejectSuccess: Return rejected. Re-inspection and return processing required.
toasts.returnRejectError: An error occurred during return rejection.
toasts.createSuccessDescription: Your checkout request has been submitted.
toasts.createError: An error occurred while submitting the checkout request.
toasts.selectEquipmentDesc: At least one equipment must be selected.

bulk.confirmApproveDescription: Approve all {count} selected checkouts. Partial failures may occur.

detail.title: Checkout Detail
detail.conditionHistoryDesc: 4-step bilateral condition check records for rental.
detail.overdueWarning: The expected return date has passed. Prompt return processing is required.

ddaySrLabel.overdue: Return is overdue by {days} days. Immediate action required

progressStep.actorYouAriaLabel: It is your turn to take action

returnInspection.calibrationDesc: Review calibration certificate and verify calibration results are satisfactory
returnInspection.repairDesc: Verify repair completion and review repair details
returnInspection.notesPlaceholder: Enter any notable findings from the inspection
returnInspection.validationCalibration: Calibration check is required for calibration checkouts.
returnInspection.validationRepair: Repair check is required for repair checkouts.
returnInspection.certificateExceptionDesc: If no approved calibration certificate has been registered after checkout, an exception reason is required.
returnInspection.certificateExceptionPlaceholder: Example: Certificate issuance is delayed by the calibration agency and will be registered on receipt
returnInspection.rentalConditionChecksNote: For rental returns, the 4-stage condition check history (appearance & operation status) serves as the inspection record. Add any special notes in the field below.

dialogs.startDescription: Start the checkout? Equipment status will be changed to 'Checked Out'. Please record the condition of each equipment before checkout.
dialogs.startConditionPlaceholder: Pre-checkout condition (e.g., Good appearance, Normal operation)
dialogs.returnApproveDescription: Approve the return? Equipment status will be restored to 'Available'.
dialogs.returnRejectDescription: Reject the return? Status will revert to 'Checked Out' and re-inspection will be required.
dialogs.returnRejectReasonPlaceholder: Enter the reason for return rejection (e.g., Inspection items not met)
dialogs.rejectDescription: Reject the checkout request. Please enter a reason for rejection.
dialogs.cancelDescription: Are you sure you want to cancel this checkout request? This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.borrowerApproveDescription: Approve this rental request (1st step)? Lender team manager's final approval will be required after this.
dialogs.borrowerRejectDescription: Reject this rental request. Please enter a reason for rejection.
dialogs.borrowerRejectReasonPlaceholder: Enter the reason for borrower team rejection

stepper.overdueMessage: The expected return date has passed.

hint.pendingBorrowerApprove: Waiting for borrower team manager's 1st approval.
hint.pendingBorrowerWait: Waiting for borrower team manager's 1st approval.
hint.waitingApprover: Will be rejected after approver review.
hint.approvedLenderCheck: Check the equipment condition and prepare for handover.
hint.lenderCheckedBorrowerReceive: The borrower needs to confirm receipt.
hint.inUseBorrowerReturn: Press the return button when returning.
hint.borrowerReturnedLenderReceive: The lender should confirm receipt of the return.
hint.checkedOutSubmitReturn: Final approval by approver required after processing return.
hint.returnedApproveReturn: Review the return and give final approval.
hint.returnedRejectReturn: Rejecting will return the equipment to checked-out status.

blocked.permission: You do not have permission for this action.
blocked.role_mismatch: This action is not for your role.
blocked.actor_team: Only the responsible department (managing department) can perform this action.

condition.comparisonDesc: Equipment condition comparison before and after rental.
condition.formGuide: Please check and record the current equipment condition.
condition.appearanceDesc: Please check the appearance of the equipment.
condition.operationDesc: Please verify the equipment is operating normally.
condition.accessoriesDesc: Please check if all accessories are present.
condition.comparisonPlaceholder: Record any changes compared to the pre-checkout condition
condition.validationAbnormalRequired: Details are required when abnormalities are found.
condition.validationComparisonRequired: Comparison notes are required when condition differs from previous check.

groupCard.selectRowDisabled: Cannot be selected in current state

selectability.statusNotSelectable: Equipment in {statusLabel} status cannot be selected
selectability.checkedOutBlocked: This equipment is already checked out. Available after return.
selectability.calibrationOverdueRentalBlocked: Calibration has expired. External rental requires valid calibration.
selectability.nonConformingRentalBlocked: Equipment is non-conforming. External rental requires equipment in normal condition.
selectability.ownTeamRentalBlocked: Your team's equipment is not eligible for external rental. Select calibration or repair instead.
selectability.otherTeamCalibrationBlocked: Calibration of another team's equipment is handled by the managing department. Select rental of other team's equipment instead.
selectability.otherTeamRepairBlocked: Repair of another team's equipment is handled by the managing department. Select rental of other team's equipment instead.

create.title: Request Equipment Checkout
create.subtitle: Select equipment and enter checkout information.
create.guideCalibration: Calibration/Repair: Only your team's equipment can be selected
create.guideRental: Rental of other team's equipment: Select the managing department first, then select equipment
create.guideApproval: Manager approval is required after request submission
create.step1Desc: Search and select equipment to checkout.
create.step2Desc: Enter required checkout information. {required} indicates required fields.
create.rentalNotice: Select a managing department to view its equipment list
create.searchPlaceholder: Search by equipment name or management number
create.selectTeamHint: Select a managing department to view equipment list.
create.noSelectedEquipmentHint: Click or press Enter on equipment in the list above
create.rentalSiteTeamHint: Select a managing department to borrow its equipment
create.destinationPlaceholder: Enter checkout location (e.g., Calibration Agency ABC)
create.reasonPlaceholder: Describe the reason in detail (e.g., External calibration request due to approaching calibration deadline)
create.expectedReturnNote: Checkout date is automatically set when checkout starts.
create.approvalRequired: Manager approval is required after submission

inbound.noDataDesc: No records match the search criteria.

outbound.noDataDesc: No records match the search criteria.

loading.teamLoanSr: Loading equipment loans from other teams.

list.emptyDescription: Start by submitting a checkout request.

returnPage.conditionHistoryDesc: Condition checks recorded during the rental period.
returnPage.inspectionDesc: Please verify the inspection items before returning the equipment. Technical manager approval is required after inspection.

pendingChecks.title: Pending Checks
pendingChecks.subtitle: List of rental items you need to confirm.

empty.title: No items to check
empty.description: There are no rental items requiring confirmation.

pendingChecks.errorDesc: Please check your network and try again.

inProgress.title: No checkouts in progress
inProgress.description: New checkout requests will appear here once submitted

completed.title: No completed checkouts
completed.description: Completed checkout history will be shown here

filtered.title: No results found
filtered.description: Try changing your filters or search term

overdueClear.title: No Overdue Checkouts
overdueClear.description: All checkouts are within their return dates

noneYet.title: No Checkouts Yet
noneYet.description: Submit a checkout request to track equipment movement here

noPermission.title: Access Restricted
noPermission.description: Your current role does not have access to the checkout list

noFilterResult.title: No Results
noFilterResult.description: Try adjusting your filters or search term

error.title: Failed to Load Checkouts
error.description: A temporary error occurred. Please try again shortly

network.title: No Internet Connection
network.description: Check your network connection and try again
network.offlineReason: New checkout requests are unavailable while offline. Please retry when network is restored.

approveReturn.success: {equipmentName} return approved. Equipment returned to storage.

borrowerApprove.success: {equipmentName} 1st approval complete. Awaiting lender team review.

pending.title: Pending Approval
pending.description: Waiting for technical manager's review and approval.

approved.title: Approved
approved.description: Checkout is ready. Logistics staff can now start the checkout.

rejected.title: Rejected
rejected.description: The approver rejected this request. Please review the reason and resubmit.

lender_checked.title: Lender Confirmed
lender_checked.description: The lender has confirmed the equipment condition. Awaiting borrower receipt confirmation.

in_use.title: Received / In Use
in_use.description: Equipment received. Confirm return when usage is complete.

borrower_returned.title: Return Confirmed
borrower_returned.description: The borrower has confirmed return. Please proceed with receiving the equipment.

checked_out.title: Checked Out
checked_out.description: The equipment is currently checked out. Please submit a return request.

returned.title: Return Submitted
returned.description: Return request submitted. Awaiting approver review.

canceled.title: Canceled
canceled.description: The checkout request has been canceled.

overdue.title: Overdue
overdue.description: The return deadline has passed. Immediate return processing is required.

return_approved.title: Return Approved
return_approved.description: The return has been approved and the equipment has been returned to storage.

lender_received.title: Return Received
lender_received.description: The lender has received the returned equipment. Please proceed with return processing.

borrower_approved.title: Borrower Approved
borrower_approved.description: The borrower team's technical manager has given first approval. Awaiting final approval from the technical manager.

completed.title: Completed
completed.description: All checkout and return procedures are complete.

return_rejected.title: Return Rejected
return_rejected.description: The return was rejected during review. Please check the status and reprocess.

conditionCheck.title: Condition Check
conditionCheck.formDescription: Check and record the current condition of the equipment.

guidance.lender_checkout: Check and record the current equipment condition before checkout. This record will be used for comparison at return.
guidance.borrower_receive: You have received the equipment. Check and record the equipment condition at the time of receipt.
guidance.borrower_return: Check and record the current equipment condition before return. It will be compared with the condition at receipt.
guidance.lender_return: Check the condition of the returned equipment. Record any changes compared to the pre-checkout condition.

handoverQR.purposeDescription: Rental handover must be conducted in-person. When the borrower scans this QR code, they will be automatically directed to the receipt confirmation screen.
handoverQR.ttlNotice: This QR code can only be used once within {minutes} minutes.
handoverQR.scanInstruction: The borrower must be logged into the system before scanning the QR code.
handoverQR.expired: QR code has expired. Please generate a new one.

borrowerApproval.rejectDialogDescription: Please enter the rejection reason. The applicant will be notified.

errors.title: Error
errors.genericError: An error occurred while processing the request.
errors.alreadyApproved: This checkout request has already been approved.
errors.notPending: This checkout request is not in a pending state.
errors.versionConflict: Another user has modified this data. Loading the latest version.
errors.revocationWindowExpired: The approval revocation window has expired.
errors.revocationReasonRequired: Please enter a revocation reason of at least {min} characters.
